prd_coverage.tool_evidence: ls found 24 wideframe files covering 8 required route screens across desktop/tablet/mobile; PRD route-map and screen sections name dashboard, board, approval, document viewer, trace explorer, task detail, search results, and task list.

component_traceability.tool_evidence: grep found 597 data-ds-id occurrences across 48 wireframe files, and component-map.json maps 3 flow files with 21 unique blocks and 38 unique selectors spanning shell, dashboard, docs, trace, task detail, approval, and recovery states.

storyboard_completeness.tool_evidence: storyboards.json is valid and contains 21 trajectories; PRD journey checks cover board, approval, dashboard, docs, trace, task detail, search, task list, and navigation flows, so the storyboard set exceeds the named PRD journey coverage.

layout_compilability.tool_evidence: layout-rules.json parsed successfully and defines desktop/tablet/mobile viewports, global shell rules, shared responsive rules, and complete screen-specific layout rules for all 8 route screens.

conflict_resolution.tool_evidence: prd-ds-conflicts.md documents 2 active conflicts with explicit resolution direction, but wireframe grep still finds spinner-centric save/bulk language in task_detail and task_list wideframes, so the skeleton-first and non-spinner save guidance is not fully propagated.

wireframe_articulation.tool_evidence: sampled dashboard, task_detail, and document_viewer wideframes show multi-state box layouts, selector annotations, and nested regions, but the mandatory mechanical flow check still returned arrows=0 for all 3 user-flow files, triggering FLOW_NOT_CONNECTED and capping this pillar at 20% of max.

fix_queue.detail: Repair all three user-flow ASCII files so the mandatory arrow-count check detects connected transitions; j1-dashboard-gap-resolution.ascii.md, j2-docs-empty-to-trace.ascii.md, and j3-approval-comment-and-recovery.ascii.md still returned arrows=0.

Remove spinner-centric save and bulk-processing language from wireframes and align to the conflict resolution guidance: task_detail--desktop/tablet wideframes still say field spinner next to Status dropdown, and task_list desktop/tablet/mobile wideframes still say selected rows/cards show spinner.
